mapper.select: select test1 from test_tbl where test2 = 'db_connect_success_2026';

SELECT pi.product_id AS productId, pi.category_id AS categoryId, pi.brand_id AS brandId, pb.brand_name AS brand,
pi.name AS productName, pi.description AS description, pi.status AS status, pi.image_url AS imageUrl, pi.price AS price, pi.weight AS weight, pi.kcal AS kcal, pi.protein AS protein, pi.sodium AS sodium, pi.sugar AS sugar, pi.saturated_fat AS saturatedFat, pi.caffeine AS caffeine, pi.created_at AS createdAt, pi.updated_at AS updatedAt, pi.informer_user_id AS informerUserId
FROM product_items pi JOIN product_brands pb ON pi.brand_id = pb.brand_id
WHERE pi.status = 'active'
ORDER BY pi.product_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO choices ( choice_group_id, user_id, product_id, gram_written, is_selected, display_order, created_at, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{choiceGroupId}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{gramWritten}, #{isSelected}, #{displayOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{expiresAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE choice_group_id = VALUES(choice_group_id), is_selected = VALUES(is_selected), display_order = VALUES(display_order), created_at = VALUES(created_at), expires_at = VALUES(expires_at)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT choice_group_id) FROM choices WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_selected = 1 AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT c.choice_id AS choiceId, c.choice_group_id AS choiceGroupId, c.user_id AS userId, c.product_id AS selectedProductId, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM grams g WHERE g.choice_id = c.choice_id AND g.status != 'deleted' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS gramWritten, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.expires_at AS expiresAt FROM choices c WHERE c.choice_id = #{choiceId}
SELECT choice_id FROM choices WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_selected = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC, choice_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT c.choice_id AS choiceId, c.choice_group_id AS choiceGroupId, c.product_id AS productId, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM grams g WHERE g.choice_id = c.choice_id AND g.status != 'deleted' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS gramWritten, c.is_selected AS isSelected, c.display_order AS displayOrder, pb.brand_name AS brand, pi.name AS productName, pi.description AS description, pi.image_url AS imageUrl, pi.price AS price, pi.kcal AS kcal, pi.protein AS protein, pi.sodium AS sodium, pi.sugar AS sugar, pi.saturated_fat AS saturatedFat FROM choices c JOIN product_items pi ON c.product_id = pi.product_id JOIN product_brands pb ON pi.brand_id = pb.brand_id WHERE c.choice_group_id = #{choiceGroupId} AND c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.display_order ASC
